title: Moroccan Pistachio Toast
description: A simple and flavorful snack that combines crispy bread, bitter greens, and crunchy pistachios, all inspired by Moroccan cuisine.

ingredients.name: Bitter greens (such as kale or arugula)
Moroccan spice blend (such as ras el hanout)

instructions: 2. Toast the bread slices for 5-7 minutes, or until crispy.
3. In a small bowl, mix together the pistachios, Moroccan spice blend, salt, and lemon juice.
4. Add the bitter greens to the bowl and toss to combine.
5. Spread the pistachio mixture onto the toasted bread slices.
6. Drizzle with olive oil and serve immediately.
